_investigation_notes.analysis: Command is registered on server (not "cannot find desc in cmd_def"), but proxy cannot generate data_key for routing. Tested all combinations of battle_type(0,9), battle_id(0,29999), lvl_id(0,29999), ksid(0,1,29999), sid(0,1), key-based params, top-level fields. Player IS in AVA battle (lvl_id=29999, confirmed by op_enter_lvl_battle returning "has enter lvl battle"). Likely requires battle routing context set by enter_battle_map (which does not exist on this test server - returns "cannot find desc").
tested_params: header: battle_type=0/9, battle_id=0/29999, lvl_id=0/29999, sid=0/1, ksid=0/1/29999
